name: Caponata
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup pitted green olives, coarsely chopped
1/3 cup pitted black olives, coarsely chopped
1/4 cup red or white wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 5 tablespoons olive oil in a stockpot.
2. Add eggplant cut into 1-inch cubes and stir fry for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and lightly touched with brown.
3. Add the remaining oil, onions, garlic, and celery; continue to stir fry for an additional 10 minutes until golden brown.
4. Mix in all remaining ingredients and cover. Reduce heat to moderately low and simmer for 1 hour, stirring about every 10 minutes.
5. Uncover and cook until very thick, achieving the consistency of chutney.
6. Prepare three pint-sized jars.
7. Ladle caponata into the jars, leaving 1 inch of headspace.
8. Wipe rims with a damp cloth.
9. Seal with lids. Pressure cooker pints at 10 pounds pressure for 30 minutes.
